description: Auditor binding spec for the drug-binding affinity re-derivation (Axis-2 spec-pinned dispatch). The representative re-derived output is the scalar binding-affinity prediction (payload/binding_prediction.json::affinity_pred), computed by stable crc32 character-bucket feature hashing (32 buckets) over the committed SMILES string and target sequence, dot-producted against the committed w_compound[32] / w_target[32] weights, plus bias, rounded to 6dp. The hashing + scoring rule lives in the verifier primitive (lifesci_binding_recompute); the comparator and tolerance are pinned HERE by the auditor (scalar_epsilon, epsilon=1e-6), not producer-asserted. A producer who ships a weaker spec gets a SHA the anchor does not list, so dispatch fails closed.
